mechanism: Container App Jobs pull images from GitHub Packages over public internet. No VNet integration means no private registry is reachable.
why: Azure Container Registry adds fixed monthly cost, while GitHub Packages avoids it. Without VNet integration, only public registries are reachable.

related.note: No VNet forces public image pulls.
Consumption constraint eliminates VNet — GitHub Packages is the zero-cost option.

violations: Image stored in Azure Container Registry — fixed monthly cost.
